title: Threading the Fence
brief: A no-fly circle straddles the direct line to the station. Fly around it — entering it ends the mission — then hold on station.
teaches: Avoidance is world-state, not a message: FA will happily fly you straight into the fence if you command it. Dog-leg the route by hand (a Direction-only UPDATE past the fence) and approach the station clear of the zone.

objective._doc: reach-hold at (-600,-600) @ 3000 m. The avoid circle at (-300,-300) sits on the direct heading-225 line, so a straight run breaches; the reference dog-legs west then south and crawls through the station.
